description:
Nail lamp

9W smart nail machine nail art light therapy machine one button time switch nail light nail dryer

feature: 

100% brand new and high quality

 Product specifications: 

Color: black, white, pink EU/US plug 

Power: 9W Timer: 30 seconds, 60 seconds, 90 seconds 

Long life: more than 10,000 hours

LED portable nail lamp does not hurt the hand, double light source bead, intelligent control

The film is made of ABS plastic, light weight and not easy to break. 

Built-in multiple time timings, allowing users to select time based on colloid type 

Use a lot of internal space, shape your own beauty as you like. 

The product has domestic and foreign patents and passed CE ROHS certification. 

Product size: 120*96*71mm 

Packing size: 181*101*81mm 

Gross weight: 269g

Rated output: 100-240V 50/60Hz 1A/2A 

 Rated input: DC 5V/12V 

 Number of beads: UV/LED lamp beads 3pcs 

Wavelength: 365+405NM/UVLED dual light source 

Baking type: LED glue UV glue   

 packing list: 

1 * LED nail dryer 

 1 * AC / DC adapter 

 1 *AC power cord 

 1 *Operation manual
